caption: A man with a goatee, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, pointed wig, is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed photos on the walls. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. To his left and right, white logos featuring a red microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear on the screen. In the initial frames, the man remains relatively still while speaking, looking slightly off-camera. As the sequence progresses, he begins to move his arms, eventually lifting his right hand in a gesture while continuing to speak. The background remains constant, showing a wall of pictures and some clothing items, including one with the brand name "LEE" visible.
